headline_highlight: No overhead. No juniors. Only experts.
headline_plain: Senior expertise directly on your site.
subline: At ASIGHT there is no handover. You work directly with the minds who drive your project to success – from the first analysis to the final implementation on the shopfloor.

founders.name: Alexander Eyb
manifesto: Real process optimization doesn't happen in meeting rooms, but where value creation takes place. My expertise is based on years of quality and process management at OEMs and Tier-1 suppliers. I know the pain of unstable processes and missing data integrity from firsthand experience.

My approach: method implementation at eye level. I'm the sparring partner who stands with your team on the shopfloor at seven in the morning. I don't just find the problem – I enable your team to sustainably live the solution. For me, acceptance within the workforce is the decisive lever for measurable efficiency gains.

founders.name: Florian Bartsch
manifesto: I build the solution. I come from project and process management and have experienced firsthand what it's like to spend Friday afternoons copying Excel spreadsheets instead of making decisions. Today I build the systems that make this obsolete – from the PLC on the machine to the dashboard for the plant manager. I harvest data where it originates and turn it into decision templates – for the production manager as well as for the board. And I stay until it works in daily operations.
